Package jogo.engine

package jogo.engine

    Description

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Events
    Represents the events that occur throughout the game.
    GameEngine
    Utility class responsible for managing core game logic and validating action requests performed by the players.
    GameSession
    Manages the core game state, including player turns, day progression, and invoking the event system to update game modifiers.
    GameSessionTest
    Test class for the GameSession class.
    WorldMap
    Responsible for creating, maintaining, and managing the core game world grid.
    WorldMapTest
    Test class for the WorldMap class.
